'''Nabatu''' was a barren [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]]. It was the tenth planet from the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Coruscant Prime/Legends|Coruscant Prime]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1stm}}
